steps.operation: Load sub/fy.bin (86,135 rows). Build bitset fy2023_mask[sub_row] where fy == 2023.
Load sub/name_offsets.bin + name_data.bin. Build name_string → name_id map. Then build sub_fk_to_name_id[sub_row] = name_id array. This merges sub rows with identical names into the same group key.
Load uom_dict to find usdCode. Load stmt_dict to find isCode.

Use stmt_offsets to get IS row range in pre. For each pre row in IS range, read (sub_fk, tag_code, version_code, pre_row_idx). Build hash map: key=(sub_fk, tag_code, version_code) → value=pre_row_idx. This is a multi-value map since multiple pre rows can match same key. Only ~1.06M entries.
Load pre/plabel_offsets.bin + plabel_data.bin. Needed to resolve plabel for matching pre rows during aggregation.

Use uom_offsets to get USD contiguous range (~33.2M rows). Load num/sub_fk.bin, num/tag_code.bin, num/version_code.bin, num/value.bin for that range. For each row: (1) check !isnan(value), (2) check fy2023_mask[sub_fk], (3) probe pre hash map with (sub_fk, tag_code, version_code), (4) for each matching pre_row: aggregate into group. Effective rows reaching probe: ~6.2M.
Aggregate SUM(value) and COUNT(*) per group key. Decode tag from tag_dict, resolve plabel from pre table, resolve name from name_id. Sort by total_value DESC, LIMIT 200.

join_order.notes: Bitset indexed by sub_fk for O(1) filter during num scan
Build hash map from IS-filtered pre rows keyed on (sub_fk, tag_code, version_code). Multi-value: one key may map to multiple pre rows. Probe from num scan.

data_structures.name_id_map: hash_map<string, uint32_t> for deduplicating sub names
data_structures.pre_hash_map: compact_hash_multimap<(sub_fk,tag_code,version_code) → pre_row_idx>, pre-sized ~1.06M entries, use same hashKey3 function as pre_by_adsh_tag_ver index
data_structures.aggregation: compact_hash_map<(name_id:u32, tag_code:u32, plabel_offset:u64) → (sum:double, count:uint64_t)>, estimated ~200K groups

group_key.rationale_name_id: Multiple sub_fk can share the same s.name; name_id deduplicates via string identity
group_key.rationale_plabel_offset: Use plabel varlen offset pair (start,end) as plabel identity proxy to avoid string hashing in hot loop
group_key.stmt_handling: p.stmt is constant 'IS' for all output rows — excluded from group key, hardcoded in output

parallelism.scan_target: num USD range partitioned into morsels of 100000 rows
parallelism.merge_strategy: merge thread-local hash maps after scan completes

indexes.purpose: Get contiguous USD row range in num to avoid scanning non-USD rows
Get contiguous IS row range in pre to build filtered pre hash map

memory_layout.notes: Sub and pre columns are small enough to fully preload. Num columns mmap'd and accessed sequentially within USD range.
